name: Propel
desc: Dash forward one tile and attack.

name: Propell2
desc: Dash forward one tile and attack, twice!

name: Hadouken
desc: Shoot an energy blast in a straight line.

name: Hadouken2
desc: Shoot a high damage energy blast in a straight line.

name: Cartwheel
desc: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally.

name: Cartwheel2
desc: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally or in a straight line.

name: Stone Fists
desc: Gain [img:str] and [img:dex] equal to your [img:shield] until the end of your turn.

name: Stone Fists
desc: Convert your [img:shield] to [img:str] and [img:dex] for the rest of the battle.

name: Transcend
desc: Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 [img:shield].

name: Transcend2
desc: Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 [img:shield]. At the end of each round, automatically cast this spell for free.

name: Hip Toss
desc: Throw a random adjacent unit two tiles away, dealing damage to it.

name: HipToss2
desc: Throw a random adjacent unit two tiles away, dealing damage to it. This deals double damage if it's thrown onto another unit.

name: Bruise
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Bruise2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.

name: Slapback
desc:
A melee attack with a high critical hit chance.
RELOAD: Take damage.

name: Slapback2
desc:
A melee attack with a 100% critical hit chance.
RELOAD: Take damage.

name: Finisher
desc:
Dash forward three tiles and attack. This deals 2 damage for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Finisher2
desc:
Dash forward three tiles and attack. This deals 2 damage for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Reverberate
desc:
Gain +8 [img:shield] and knock back adjacent units two tiles. This spell costs 3 mana less for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Reverberate2
desc:
Gain +8 [img:shield] and knock back adjacent units two tiles. This spell costs 3 mana less and grants 1 extra [img:shield] for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Combo Throw
desc: A melee attack with Knockback 3. When this hits, switch into ranged stance and refresh your basic attack.

name: ComboThrow2
desc:
A melee attack with Knockback 3. When this hits, switch into ranged stance and refresh your basic attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Combo Pull
desc: A ranged attack that pulls the unit it hits toward you. When this hits, switch into melee stance and refresh your basic attack.

name: ComboPull2
desc:
A ranged attack that pulls the unit it hits toward you. When this hits, switch into melee stance and refresh your basic attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: One With the Wind
desc: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn.

name: OneWithTheWind2
desc: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn and refresh your movement action.

name: Pogo
desc: Jump to a tile. Bounce off any unit you land on, damaging that unit.

name: Pogo2
desc: Jump to a tile. Bounce off any unit you land on, damaging and Bruising that unit.

name: Way of the Mantis
desc: For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.

name: TrainArms2
desc:
For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Porcupine
desc: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn.

name: Porcupine2
desc: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn. Also reflect the next projectile you're hit by.

name: Anneal
desc: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.

name: Anneal
desc: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn, and after each time you spend mana on another spell.

name: Deep Dive
desc: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 1 HP, 15 [img:shield], and All Stats Up.

name: DeepDive2
desc: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 50% HP, 20 [img:shield], 2 [img:divineshield], and All Stats Up 2.

name: Hop n' Block
desc: Jump to a tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.

name: HopAndBlock2
desc: Jump to any tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.

name: Way of the Owl
desc: For the rest of the battle, the first spell you cast each turn is cast twice.

name: TrainMind2
desc:
For the rest of the battle, the first spell you cast each turn is cast twice.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Meditate
desc: Heal yourself for 8 HP and gain +8 Shield, All Stats Up 2, and Sleep 8.

name: Meditate
desc:
Heal yourself for 8 HP and gain +8 Shield, All Stats Up 2, and Drowsy 8.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Five Point Palm Exploding Heart Technique
desc: A melee attack that causes a unit to die at the end of its next turn. Bosses fall asleep at the end of their next turn instead.

name: DoomPunch2
desc:
A melee attack that causes a unit to die at the end of its next turn. Bosses fall asleep at the end of their next turn instead.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Ki Burst
desc: Deal 1 damage and knockback adjacent units. Gain +1 [img:shield].

name: KiBurst2
desc: Deal 2 damage and knockback adjacent units 2 tiles. Gain +2 [img:shield].

name: Dragon Punch
desc: A magic damage melee attack with knockback 3 that inflicts Confusion.

name: DragonPunch2
desc: A strong magic damage melee attack with knockback 10 that inflicts Confusion.

name: Way of the Hare
desc: For the rest of the battle, you can move an extra time each turn.

name: TrainLegs2
desc:
For the rest of the battle, you can move an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Really Fast Run
desc: Run in a straight line up to 4 tiles, through objects. Wind blows over tiles you run through.

name: ReallyFastRun2
desc: Run diagonally or in a straight line any distance, through objects. Wind blows over tiles you run through.

name: Ocular Pat Down
desc: Inflict Marked and Magic Weakness 1 on a unit.

name: DetectWeakness2
desc: Inflict Marked 3 and Magic Weakness 3 on a unit.

name: Hundred Hand Slap
desc: A ten-hit multi-strike melee attack with Knockback 10 at the end of the combo.

name: HundredHandSlap2
desc: A ten-hit multi-strike melee attack with Knockback 10 at the end of the combo. Each hit has a 10% chance to inflict Bruise. The final hit deals extra damage.

name: Kinetic Charge
desc: Gain +1 temporary Kinetic Spikes.

name: KineticCharge2
desc: Gain +2 temporary Kinetic Spikes.

name: Air Burst
desc: A burst of air that knocks back units diagonally from the target.

name: AirBurst2
desc: A large burst of air that knocks back units diagonally from the target.

name: Way of the Turtle
desc: Gain +1 Brace.

name: TrainBody2
desc:
Gain +1 Brace.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Release Energy
desc: Emit 10 Sparkles.

name: ReleaseEnergy2
desc:
Emit 10 Sparkles.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Pummel
desc: A melee attack that does 3 more damage each time you use it on the same turn. This attack inflicts all status effects your basic attack does.

name: Pummel2
desc:
A melee attack that does 4 more damage each time you use it on the same turn. This attack inflicts all status effects your basic attack does.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Quick Attack
desc: Teleport, then use your basic attack on an enemy within range. This spell's range is increased by 2 for each empty armor slot you have.

name: QuickAttack2
desc:
Teleport, then use your basic attack on an enemy within range. This spell's range is increased by 2 for each empty armor slot you have.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Perfect Form
desc: Gain +1 [img:shield] for each empty armor slot you have, then switch stances.

name: PerfectForm2
desc: Gain +1 [img:shield] and heal 1 HP for each empty armor slot you have, then switch stances.

name: Warm Up Stretch
desc: Gain +1 [img:dex], and +1 [img:spd]. This spell costs 2 mana less for each empty armor slot you have.

name: WarmupStretch2
desc: Gain +1 [img:dex], +1 [img:spd] and +1 [img:str]. This spell costs 2 mana less for each empty armor slot you have.

name: Flying Fist
desc: A melee attack with knockback that hits two tiles away from you. This spell's range is increased by 1 each time you use it on the same turn.

name: FlyingFist2
desc: A melee attack with knockback that hits two tiles away from you. This spell's range is increased by 1 and mana cost decreased by 1 each time you use it on the same turn.

name: Charge Spirit Bomb
desc:
Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb.
Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy until you throw it.

name: SpiritBomb2
desc:
Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb.
Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy+ until you throw it.

name: Throw Spirit Bomb
desc:
Throw the Spirit Bomb, then this ability becomes Charge Spirit Bomb.
[s:.7](Cannot be thrown with 0 charges.)[/s]

name: Donate Energy
desc: Give +1 damage to the Spirit Bomb!

name: DonateEnergy2
desc: Give +2 damage to the Spirit Bomb!

name: One Punch
desc:
A one-hit kill punch. Gain All Stats Down on use.
This deals 25 damage to bosses instead of killing them.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: One Punch
desc:
A one-hit kill punch. It causes a cone of wind that deals 5 damage. Gain All Stats Down on use.
This deals 25 damage to bosses instead of killing them.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Unbridled Hits
desc: A weak melee attack that hits an extra time for each empty armor slot you have.

name: UnbridledHits2
desc: A weak melee attack that hits two extra times for each empty armor slot you have.

name: Kamehameha
desc:
Fire a magic blast at a unit within 5 tiles. Requires line of sight.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle. If all your armor slots are empty, castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Kamehameha2
desc:
Fire a magic blast at a unit anywhere within your line of sight.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle. If all your armor slots are empty, castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Sidestep
desc: Move one tile and gain +1 [img:shield].

name: SideStep2
desc:
Move one tile and gain +1 [img:shield].
This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.

name: Unimpeded Lunge
desc:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to the number of empty armor slots you have plus one.

name: UnimpededLunge2
desc:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to twice the number of empty armor slots you have.

name: Double Dragon
desc: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself within three tiles that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.

name: DoubleDragon2
desc: Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself on any tile that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.

name: Fist of Fate
desc: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it.

name: FistOfFate2
desc: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times on different targets.

name: Nirvana
desc:
Gain +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:shield].
If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.

name: Nirvana2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:int] and +2 [img:shield].
If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.

name: Empty Mind
desc:
You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.

name: EmptyMind2
desc:
You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.
Get an extra turn when you cast this.

name: Position
desc: Teleport exactly two tiles away, then switch stances.

name: Position2
desc: Teleport two to four tiles away, then switch stances.

name: Charge Fists
desc: Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.

name: ChargeFists2
desc:
Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.
Refresh your basic attack.

name: Summon Apprentice
desc: Summon a half-sized copy of yourself with half your stats. It's AI-controlled and can't use spells.

name: Apprentice2
desc: Summon a half-sized copy of yourself with half your stats. It's AI-controlled and CAN use spells.
